Each vape comes pre-filled with e-liquid and has a pre-charged battery, meaning it’s ready to use as soon as you open the package. When the e-liquid runs out or the battery dies, simply dispose of the device and grab a new one. This eliminates the need for refilling e-liquids, changing coils, or charging batteries—making it a hassle-free option for vapers who prefer simplicity.
5. Quality Build and Safety Features Enjoy Ultra Vapes are built with durability and safety in mind. The devices are designed with high-quality materials to ensure a long-lasting vaping experience. Additionally, they come with several built-in safety features, such as protection against overheating, short circuits, and overcharging, to ensure a safe and reliable vaping experience.
Benefits of Using Enjoy Ultra Vapes Convenience and Portability One of the biggest advantages of using Enjoy Ultra Vapes is the convenience they offer. With their disposable design, you can take them anywhere without worrying about refills, charging, or maintenance. Whether you’re traveling, commuting, or just spending time outdoors, these vapes are designed to be portable and easy to carry. Their slim profile makes them an ideal option for people on the go.For those new to vaping, Enjoy Ultra Vapes are an excellent option due to their user-friendly design. There's no complicated setup or maintenance involved, and the auto-draw activation means that users can start vaping immediately without needing to figure out how the device works. For beginners, this provides a smooth, low-barrier introduction to the world of vaping.
3. Perfect for Those Who Want a Hassle-Free Experience If you’re tired of dealing with the complexities of traditional vapes, like refilling e-liquid, cleaning coils, and replacing batteries, then Enjoy Ultra Vapes are a perfect solution. With their disposable nature, these devices offer a completely hassle-free vaping experience. Simply open the package, inhale, and dispose of the device once it’s empty.
4. Consistent Flavor Delivery Since Enjoy Ultra Vapes come pre-filled with e-liquid, you can be sure that each puff will deliver a consistent and smooth flavor. The high-quality e-liquids used in the devices ensure that you get a satisfying taste from the first puff to the last, without the risk of flavor degradation that can sometimes happen with refillable tanks or older disposable vapes.
5. Cost-Effective in the Long Run While disposable vapes may seem more expensive upfront, Enjoy Ultra Vapes offer long-lasting performance, making them a cost-effective choice in the long run. With a higher puff count than many other disposable vapes, you’ll spend less time replacing your vape and more time enjoying your sessions. For those who vape regularly, the longevity of these devices can make them a great investment.
How to Use Enjoy Ultra Vapes Using an Enjoy Ultra Vape is incredibly simple:Open the packaging and remove the device. Inhale from the mouthpiece to activate the device. The auto-draw feature will begin producing vapor immediately. Enjoy the smooth and flavorful vapor with each puff. Once the e-liquid runs out or the battery is depleted, dispose of the device responsibly and grab a new one. There’s no need to worry about refilling, charging, or adjusting settings—just enjoy a hassle-free vaping experience.
Where to Buy Enjoy Ultra Vapes Enjoy Ultra Vapes can be found at various online retailers and local vape shops. Be sure to purchase from reputable sources to ensure that you are getting a genuine product with high-quality e-liquid and safe components.The Enjoy Ultra Vapes offer a perfect balance of convenience, performance, and flavor, making them an excellent choice for both beginners and experienced vapers alike. Whether you’re looking for a portable vape to take on the go, or simply want a device that delivers consistent flavor with minimal effort, Enjoy Ultra Vapes are the way to go.If you're looking for a high-quality, easy-to-use disposable vape, the Enjoy Ultra Vapes might be the perfect option for you.

With its high puff count, easy-to-use design, and smooth flavors, it provides a satisfying alternative to traditional smoking. Many vapers find that disposable vapes like the R & M Tornado 9000 offer a more convenient and enjoyable experience than regular cigarettes, helping them to gradually quit smoking.
How to Use the R & M Tornado 9000 Using the R & M Tornado 9000 is incredibly simple:Open the packaging and remove the device. Inhale from the mouthpiece. The auto-draw feature will activate the device and deliver smooth, flavorful vapor. Once the device is empty, dispose of it responsibly and grab a new one. There’s no need to worry about refilling e-liquids, charging the battery, or replacing coils. It’s that easy.
Where to Buy the R & M Tornado 9000 The R & M Tornado 9000 can be purchased from a variety of trusted online retailers and local vape shops. Make sure to choose a reliable source to ensure you’re getting an authentic product with top-quality e-liquid and performance.The R & M Tornado 9000 is an excellent choice for anyone looking for a long-lasting, convenient, and enjoyable vaping experience. With its impressive 9,000 puffs, wide range of premium flavors, and easy-to-use design, it’s the perfect device for both beginners and experienced vapers alike. Whether you're on the go or simply relaxing at home, the R & M Tornado 9000 is always ready to deliver smooth, flavorful vapor with minimal effort.If you’re looking for a hassle-free, high-performance disposable vape, the R & M Tornado 9000 is the ultimate solution.

item.title: 2025-03-07 IT/기술 뉴스 모음 (15:32)
item.author: 정유준
item.content:encoded:
안녕하세요! 오늘의 주요 IT/기술 뉴스를 토픽별로 정리해드립니다. 각 뉴스는 AI가 요약한 내용이며, 자세한 내용은 원문 링크를 통해 확인하실 수 있습니다.
LGU+, ‘사람 중심 AI’ 제시..고객신뢰 시작점 LG유플러플러스가 인공지능(AI) 사업에서 ‘보안’을 강조하며 ‘AI 기술 자체보다 고객에게 집중하는 ‘사람 중심 AI’를 지향한다고 말하며 밝은 세상을 위한 4A 전략을 소개했다. ‘모바일 월드 콩그레스(MWC) 2025’ 행사 이틀째인 4일(현지시간), AI 기술 비전과 실행 전략을 공개했다. 홍범식 LG유플러스 대표는 “AI) 기술 자체가 아닌 고객에 집중하고 고객 중심 사람이 중심(Antruistic) AI를 만들어 가겠다는 전략으로 “보안”을 강조했다.
[bnTV] 관세 전쟁 포화, 기술주 위기로.. 빅테크·AI ‘충격’ 보안뉴스는 보안 상장기업들에 대한 증권 정보 서비스를 제공하고 있는 '보안뉴스TV(bnTV) ‘보안상장기업 한 주간 증권 소식> 보안 뉴스 네이버 네이버의 보안 정보 서비스로 보안된 AI, AIAM의 'AI' 보안 보안 시스템에 대한 보안 ‘AA, AIMM AI' 등 보안 관련 정보 서비스는, 보안정보의 ‘ 보안ADD, KIO,'보안 AM' 등의 증권 정보를 제공하고, 보안보안 뉴스TV의 <보안 상장기업의 한 주간의 시장 흐름과 보안 포털의 정보 정보 제공, 이소미 보안 소식 등 2월 4주차 보안 거래의 증권 뉴스에 대해, 본 본, 진행·영상편집 : 이 소미 정보에 보안 이슈 이슈에 큰 부담을 안겼습니다.
[사람과 보안] AI라는 도구를 활용하는 ‘호모 파베르’의 자세 AI는 ‘AI 양극화’ 현상은 ‘호모 파베르’가 되어야 하나 ‘보안뉴스 성기노’라는 검색어를 검색한 결과 AI라는 ‘도구’를 쓰는 인간의 숙련도와 그 격차에 따른 AI의 발전 속도는 자신도 따라가기가 버거울 정도라고 하였다. A씨는''라고 검색된다.' 라는 검색어로 검색을 쉽게 할 수 있는 AI와 관련한 저서도 내고 각종 강연회의 인기 초청 강사로서 활발한 활동을 하고있으나 그에게도 고민이 있다.
류광준 과기정통부 본부장, ＂AI 연구개발, 지원 확대＂ 약속 류광준 과학기술정보통신부 과학기술혁신본부장은 7일 서울 서울 서초구 ‘국가 인공지능(AI) 연구거점’에서 AI 분야 연구현장 간담회를 열었으며, AI 연구 현장 간담회를 개최하였고 AI분야 연구현 간담회를 열어 대학과 기업, 정부출연 연구자 및 기업인 등이 참석하여 AI 관련 현장 현장의 의견을 지속해 듣고 듣고 연구연구(R&D) 투자를 이어 나가겠다고 말했다. ‘조재호 기자(sw@bo boannews.com)] [ [저작권자: 보안뉴스(보안뉴스, 보안 eboomnews.com(이하 조재 on e ee )을] < <류광준의 과학기술 정보통신기술혁신혁신본부를 운영하는 ‘AI는 우리나라의 미래를 바꿀 핵심 기술로서 정부에서도 중요성을 인지하고 지원을 확대해 나가고 있는 현 현원의 의견을 수렴하여 듣고 의견을 듣는 ‘현장의 의견과 의견을 공유하고 듣고 듣는 듣는 의견을 듣고 의견을 들은 들은 ‘류재준 본부장’은 AI가 우리나라의 정부의 미래를 바꾸는 핵심기술로 정부도 중요하다는 것을 인지한 ‘알고 있는 KRR&D를 이어 나가고 있다.한국산업기술보호협회(KAITS)는 ‘2025년도 국가핵심기술을 보유한 중소·중견기업과 연구기관, 대학 등을 대상으로 보안설비구축 비용을 지원하는 사업으로, 기업당 최대 4000만원까지 지원 받을 수 있고, 중소기업과 대학은 구축비용의 최대 80%까지, 중견기업·연구기관은 50%까지 각각 구축비용을 지원받을 수 있다고 밝혔으며, ‘수요 맞춤형’과 ‘컨설팅 연계형’으로 나뉜다고 밝혔다.
박현우 라온시큐어 보안개발본부장 “PQC 대전환 준비하라”..기존 암호체계 용도폐기 박현우 라온시큐어 보안개발본부장은 최근 <보안뉴스>와 가진 인터뷰에서 포스트퀀텀 시대에 대비한 양자내성암호(PQC) 보안 전략을 강조하며 PQC 체계 전환이 본격 진행될 것이란 게 그의 예측이라고 밝혔다. eva는 “10~15년 사이 기존 암호체계가 무력화될 가능성이 큽니다. 지금부터 P QC 전환을 준비해야 합니다”라고 전했다. ‘보안 뉴스’와의 인터뷰에서, PC보안부터 보안 개발본부장, AI연구센터장까지 13년째 라 온시 큐어보안 부문을 책임져 온 그는 “최근 양자컴퓨팅 기술이 급속히 발전하면서, 기존 RSA 암호가 더 이상 안전하지 않을 가능성이 커지고 있다”며 PqC로 전환 이 불가피한 이유를 설명했다.
[카드뉴스] 2025년 보안 혁신! 하이브리드 보안 솔루션 TOP 5
SK쉴더스-KB데이타시스템, 금융 보안 ‘맞손’ SK쉴더스(대표 홍원표)는 KB데이타시스템과 금융 IT 보안을 위한 업무협약(MOU)을 체결했다고 7일 밝혔으며 이번 협력을 계기고 사이버보안 서비스 분야에서 신규 비즈니스 기회를 창출하고 안전한 금융 환경 구축을 위한 고도화된 고객 서비스 제공에 나설 계획이다. KT는 보안 기술과 컨설팅 역량을 활용하여 KB 데이타시스템을의 보안 체계를 한층 강화하고, KB는 올해 정보보호팀을 신설하고 정보보 컨설팅과 통합 보안관제, 클라우드 보안 등을 중심으로 보안 역량을 확대한다.
2025년 3월 물리·정보보안 기업 어떤 인재 찾고 있나? 3월은 국내 보안시장의 가장 큰 행사인 SECON&eGISEC이 열리는 달이기도 해 행사장을 찾는 이들에게 자사의 솔루션과 제품을 선보이기 위해 참가업체들이 분주한 한 달을 보내게 된다. 이렇듯 새로운 기운이 움트는 3월, 보안 기업의 인재 찾기 또한 지속되고 있다. 3월에는 어떤 기업에서 어떤 기업을 어떤 인재를 찾고 있을까? 서로에게 딱 맞는 인연을 찾기를 바라는 마음을 담아 인재채용 정보를 정리해봤다.본문 이미지 '씨아이즈는 경력에 상관없이 초대졸 이상의 학력을 보유한 영업지원 담당자를 구인한다.도구공간(대표 김진효)은 자체 개발한 로봇제어 소프트웨어 ‘플래너(Planner)’ 최신버전 V4를 공식 출시했다고 5일 밝혔으며 VI는 No-Code 기반 애플리케이션으로 프로그래밍 지식 없이 누구나 쉽게 로봇을 운용할 수 있다. 직관적인 UI를 통해 △순찰 현장 맵핑, 순찰 일정 관리, 임무 할당 등의 작업,임무할당 △자율주행 시나리오 편집,로봇 원격 조정 등을 작업할수 있다.이 포스트는 AI가 자동으로 생성한 IT/기술 뉴스 모음입니다. 뉴스의 저작권은 각 언론사에 있으며, 링크를 통해 원문을 확인하실 수 있습니다. 요약 내용에 오류가 있을 수 있으니, 중요한 내용은 반드시 원문을 확인해주세요.

item.title: How SaaS is Revolutionizing Businesses: Trends and Predictions for 2025
item.author: article1
item.content:encoded: The SaaS industry has been at the forefront of digital transformation, reshaping how businesses operate. By offering scalable, cost-effective, and flexible solutions, SaaS is revolutionizing various industries. As we move into 2025, several key trends and predictions are set to redefine the SaaS landscape, ensuring its continued dominance in the business world.1. AI and Machine Learning IntegrationArtificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) are increasingly becoming integral to SaaS platforms. Businesses are leveraging these technologies for advanced data analytics, predictive modeling, and automation. In 2025, AI-driven SaaS solutions will enhance customer experiences, streamline operations, and provide intelligent insights that drive business growth. Automated decision-making and personalized user experiences will be key differentiators for SaaS providers.2. Increased Focus on Cybersecurity and ComplianceWith data breaches and cyber threats on the rise, businesses are prioritizing security. SaaS providers are incorporating advanced security measures, including end-to-end encryption, zero-trust security models, and AI-powered threat detection. Compliance with regulations such as GDPR, CCPA, and evolving global cybersecurity standards will be a major focus, ensuring businesses can trust cloud-based services without compromising data integrity.3. Vertical SaaS on the RiseUnlike traditional horizontal SaaS solutions that cater to broad industries, vertical SaaS is gaining traction. Tailored to specific industries such as healthcare, finance, and manufacturing, these niche solutions address unique pain points and regulatory requirements. The rise of vertical SaaS will enable businesses to access highly customized software, leading to greater efficiency and industry-specific innovations.4. Expansion of No-Code and Low-Code PlatformsAs businesses seek faster and more cost-effective development solutions, no-code and low-code platforms are becoming essential. These platforms empower non-technical users to create and customize applications without extensive coding knowledge. In 2025, the demand for these solutions will grow, enabling companies to accelerate digital transformation initiatives and reduce dependency on traditional software development.5. Subscription-Based and Usage-Based Pricing ModelsSaaS pricing models are evolving to align with customer preferences and business needs. Subscription-based pricing has been the norm, but 2025 will see a shift towards usage-based pricing, where businesses only pay for what they use. This model offers greater flexibility, making SaaS more accessible for startups and small enterprises while optimizing costs for larger corporations.6. Hybrid and Multi-Cloud StrategiesAs businesses demand greater flexibility, hybrid and multi-cloud approaches are becoming the standard. SaaS providers are enabling seamless integration across multiple cloud environments, allowing businesses to avoid vendor lock-in and enhance operational resilience. This trend ensures companies can optimize workloads, improve performance, and maintain business continuity.7. Enhanced Collaboration and Remote Work SolutionsThe hybrid work model is here to stay, and SaaS solutions are evolving to support seamless collaboration. Cloud-based productivity tools, video conferencing platforms, and project management software are becoming more sophisticated. In 2025, SaaS will continue to drive remote work efficiency, integrating AI-driven collaboration features and real-time data synchronization.SaaS is undeniably shaping the future of businesses, providing scalable, innovative, and secure solutions. With AI integration, enhanced security, industry-specific offerings, and flexible pricing models, the SaaS landscape in 2025 will be more dynamic than ever. Companies that embrace these trends will gain a competitive edge, ensuring long-term success in an increasingly digital world.

item.title: Hayati pro max box of 10
item.author: Sam Wilson
item.content:encoded: Hayati Pro Max Box of 10: Premium Disposable Vapes for Long-Lasting Satisfaction If you're looking for a premium disposable vape that combines exceptional flavor, long-lasting performance, and unbeatable convenience, then the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 might just be what you need. Whether you're new to vaping or a seasoned enthusiast, the Hayati Pro Max offers a remarkable vaping experience with its impressive features and multiple flavor options. In this article, we will explore everything you need to know about the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10, its benefits, and why it's becoming one of the most sought-after disposable vape products on the market.What is the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10? The Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 is a pack containing ten premium disposable vapes, each designed to provide up to 5000 puffs of smooth, flavorful vaping. These vapes come pre-filled with high-quality e-liquid and feature a built-in battery that ensures a seamless experience right from the moment you open the box. The Hayati Pro Max is an ideal solution for those who want to avoid the hassle of refilling tanks, changing coils, or worrying about battery life—everything is ready to use out of the box.The Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 is perfect for vapers who want to have multiple units on hand for longer usage or for those who like to switch up their flavors throughout the day. With 10 units in one box, you'll be well-prepared for a long period of enjoyable vaping without needing to purchase a new device every time.Key Features of the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10Extended Puff Count Each Hayati Pro Max disposable vape offers up to 5000 puffs, which is significantly more than standard disposable vapes. This extended puff count ensures that you get long-lasting value from each device, making it perfect for frequent vapers who want fewer replacements and a more consistent experience. With 10 vapes in the box, you're guaranteed an extended vaping experience with minimal hassle.Convenient and Easy to Use One of the biggest advantages of disposable vapes like the Hayati Pro Max is their simplicity. There’s no need to worry about refilling e-liquids, charging batteries, or maintaining your device. Each vape comes fully charged and pre-filled, so all you need to do is open the package and start vaping. Once the e-liquid runs out or the battery dies, simply dispose of it and grab a new one. This makes it incredibly easy to enjoy a high-quality vape without dealing with the complexities of traditional vaping systems.Premium Flavor Options The Hayati Pro Max disposable vapes come in a wide range of flavors to satisfy every preference. Whether you're into fruity blends, refreshing menthols, or sweet dessert flavors, you'll find something you love in the Hayati Pro Max lineup. The e-liquids used in these vapes are of premium quality, ensuring that each puff delivers a consistent and flavorful experience.Some popular flavors include:Tropical Mango Cool Mint Strawberry Watermelon With the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10, you’ll get multiple flavors to enjoy, ensuring you have the variety you need to keep things interesting.Sleek and Portable Design The Hayati Pro Max has been designed with both functionality and style in mind. The device is compact, sleek, and portable, making it easy to carry in your pocket or bag. Whether you're traveling, out with friends, or just enjoying a quiet moment at home, the Hayati Pro Max is convenient to carry around and use anytime. Its ergonomic design makes it comfortable to hold, while the slim profile ensures it doesn’t take up much space in your bag or pocket.Affordable and Value for Money The Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 offers fantastic value for money. With 10 units in one box, you’re able to stock up and enjoy your favorite vape flavors without having to constantly buy single units. Given the long-lasting puff count of 5000 puffs per vape, this pack offers an excellent cost-per-use ratio compared to other disposable vapes that require more frequent replacements.Why Choose the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10?Long-Lasting Performance The Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 stands out in the world of disposable vapes because of its impressive puff count and long-lasting performance. With up to 5000 puffs per device, it ensures that you get maximum usage and value. The box of 10 ensures that you have a continuous supply of disposable vapes, which makes it easier to keep your vaping sessions going without worrying about constant replacements.Convenience and Ease of Use Vaping should be a hassle-free experience, and the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 delivers just that. There’s no need for any setup or maintenance. Simply open the package, inhale, and enjoy. This is ideal for anyone who wants to skip the complexity of traditional vaping and enjoy a straightforward and satisfying vape.Perfect for On-the-Go Vapers If you’re someone who’s always on the move, the Hayati Pro Max is the perfect choice. Its compact and portable design makes it easy to carry with you wherever you go. Whether you’re commuting, traveling, or just hanging out with friends, the Hayati Pro Max ensures that you always have a reliable vaping companion by your side.Great for Vaping Variety With a Box of 10, you can explore different flavors and find your favorites without being tied down to just one option. This is particularly beneficial for those who enjoy trying new flavors or like to switch things up based on their mood. The wide variety of flavors offered in the Hayati Pro Max range ensures that there’s something for everyone.Ideal for Vaping Enthusiasts and Beginners Alike The Hayati Pro Max is perfect for both beginners and experienced vapers. Beginners will appreciate the simplicity and ease of use, while more experienced users will enjoy the wide range of flavors and long-lasting performance. Whether you're new to vaping or a seasoned pro, the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 ensures you get the most out of every session.How to Use the Hayati Pro Max? Using the Hayati Pro Max is incredibly simple:Open the package and remove the disposable vape. The device is auto-draw activated, so just inhale from the mouthpiece. Enjoy the smooth, flavorful vape! Once the e-liquid runs out or the battery dies, dispose of the device responsibly and grab a new one. No buttons, no chargers, no refills—just a straightforward and enjoyable vaping experience every time.Where to Buy the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10? The Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 can be purchased from a variety of trusted online retailers that specialize in vape products. These retailers offer competitive pricing, fast shipping, and excellent customer service, making it easy to stock up on your favorite disposable vapes.Conclusion The Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 is an excellent choice for vapers who want long-lasting, hassle-free, and flavorful vaping. With up to 5000 puffs per device and a wide range of premium flavors, the Hayati Pro Max is designed to deliver a satisfying vaping experience that lasts. Whether you're new to vaping or an experienced user, this box set provides convenience, variety, and value for money, making it an essential addition to your vaping routine.If you’re looking for a reliable, flavorful, and affordable disposable vape, the Hayati Pro Max Box of 10 is the perfect option for you.

item.title: How Creators & Small Businesses Can Automate Their YouTube Videos Using AI & More
item.author: Nitin Sharma
item.content:encoded: Let me be honest — when I started my YouTube channel, I was completely overwhelmed.As a content writer, my life on Medium was simple: write, hit publish, and make money. That's it.But YouTube? That was a whole different game.I had to hunt for the right topics, write a killer script, record the video, edit it, and design the thumbnail - all that just for one quality video.The result? I got burned out, couldn't focus, and eventually quit.But things are different now. There are smarter, faster ways to handle this - all thanks to AI and outsourcing. And that's exactly what I'm going to share with you today.Note that if you're a busy small business owner and don't want to waste your time, you can simply hire an expert to handle your whole YouTube process.For that, you can visit to freelancing platforms like Fiverr and search for "YouTube automation", then hire one of the experts based on their reviews, ratings, and more.As you can see, you can hire experts in a wide range starting from $10 and up.But why only Fiverr? Well, it's the only trusted platform that provides you with experts at an affordable price, so I believe it's the best option for you as a small business.Now, let's talk about "AI + Outsourcing" strategies that can automate 90% of your work - so you can focus on creating YouTube videos without feeling stressed.With that said, let's get started.Step 1: Set up your YouTube channelYou only need four things: a name, a description, a logo, and a banner image. And guess what? AI can handle most of it for you.For the name and description, you just need to use ChatGPT.As you can see, it gave me some really great name ideas for my YouTube channel. In fact, I liked them so much that I picked one - "AI Made Simple" - for both my newsletter and my YouTube channel.And since your logo represents your brand, it's important to make sure it looks professional and high-quality.My recommendation is to use Fiverr Logo Maker since it combines "your input + AI technology + designs from expert creators" to give you a professional logo.Lastly, for creating a banner, write a prompt in Leonardo AI to generate one, or simply use Canva. If you prefer alternative AI tools like Stability Diffusion or Midjourney instead of Leonardo AI, you're free to use them.Step 2: Research high-demand content ideasFinds the latest, up-to-date information instead of old blog posts.Checks multiple sources and gives real citations, so you know the info is real.Quickly summarizes multiple long articles and gives a clear, short answer to your question.In short, you ask something specific, and Perplexity gives you real-time information, well-organized and with trusted sources.Well, I want to know the latest news about AI, and more.So every day, I go to Perplexity, ask for the latest updates, do more research, and get the information I need in seconds.It saves me hours. You should definitely try it.Step 3: Write engaging scripts using AI tools & moreNow, we all know that every YouTube video needs a good script, and if you're writing manually by yourself, it can take a lot of time.Trust me - I've been writing on Medium for years, and a single post takes me over 5 hours to finish.So once you've done your research with Perplexity, you can use ChatGPT to help generate a script based on your topic.But here's the problem - while ChatGPT can generate you a decent script, it's not enough if you want to create high-quality content.You need to make some tweaks or modify it so that your video stands out. Even add your expertise, your human touch, and your unique voice.A better option? You can hire a professional scriptwriter from a trusted freelancing platform like Fiverr.And if you don't have much time to find the best freelancer or want some premium quality of work, you can simply hire any of the Fiverr's pro script writers to complete your work.Step 4: Create voiceovers & faceless contentNow, when it comes to creating the AI voiceover, the best AI tool I would recommend is ElevenLabs.It generates the most realistic speech with the help of AI, and it even has a number of voice options to choose from.Talking about the pricing, you can get started for free, and even the starter plan costs just $5 per month.Now, I have to be honest - there are other AI tools as well like Murf AI, but they are not so great or popular in comparison to ElevenLabs.Now, let's talk about how you can generate AI images and videos for your faceless YouTube channel.The process is simple: ask ChatGPT to generate some prompts based on your script, and then use those prompts to generate images in Leonardo AI.As you can see, it provided a number of prompts that I can use - I just need to copy and paste them inside Leonardo AI.Here are the images I got from the first and third prompts in Leonardo AI:You can download these images and add these visuals to create your faceless YouTube video.In a similar way, you can even generate 3 to 5-second videos using Pika and then add these visuals while creating your faceless YouTube videos.Step 5: Edit your YouTube videosLet me be honest - I've tried a number of AI video tools to edit, and no doubt most of them were insane.But I suggest hiring a video editor because if you try editing the videos, even with AI, it's going to take a ton of time.And here are some of the best and pro video editors you can hire.Talking about me, I've hired a video editor from Fiverr who makes some of the best videos for me when I needed.Along with that, sometimes I even use Opus Clip and Hedra, and I love both of these AI tools.Talking about Opus Clip - I just need to upload one of my videos, and it automatically creates multiple short clips, picks the best parts, adds captions, and does everything for me.And Hedra helps me make a video by generating the audio, adding my own character or creating one with Hedra's features, and then making an awesome video for free.Step 6: Design an eye-catching thumbnailNow, this is the final step where you need to create an attention-grabbing thumbnail for your YouTube video.Here's how I do it: I use a powerful combo of ChatGPT, Leonardo AI, and Canva.To be specific, when generating a cover image or thumbnail, I give ChatGPT all the necessary details so it can create some attention-grabbing prompts.Next, I copy one of the prompts I like into Leonardo AI to generate the thumbnail. Of course, I can tweak it however I want.Once I find the one I like, I download it and edit it on Canva. Yes, it's that simple.Another easy option is to hire a freelancer from a freelancing platform.Once again, visit Fiverr, search for "youtube thumbnail", and hire the best one based on ratings, reviews, and your budget.And if you want to hire the best pro thumbnail designers selected by the Fiverr team, here's the link.If you've made it this far, you're already ahead of 99% of people who are still struggling to start their YouTube channel, or want to use AI.The truth? You don't need to do everything yourself.You have the right AI tools, and you can even outsource some of the work to cut your workload by 90% and focus on what actually matters.Here's a quick recap of everything we covered: Use AI tools like ChatGPT, Fiverr Logo Maker, and Leonardo AI to generate names, descriptions, logos, and banners.Find high-demand content: Perplexity AI saves you hours with up-to-date, well-organized research. Use ChatGPT for a solid start, but hire experts when you want the best quality.Create voiceovers & faceless content: For this, you can use AI tools like ElevenLabs, Leonardo AI, and Pika. AI tools are great, but hiring a professional editor can take your content to the next level.Design eye-catching thumbnails: Combine ChatGPT, Leonardo AI, and Canva, or hire an expert.Of course, there are other options too, and you can even automate part of the process using tools like Zapier, DryMerge, and others.But some of these options are useless, some are complicated, and most don't always work as expected.If you've found this post helpful, make sure to subscribe to my newsletter, AI Made Simple where I dive deeper into practical AI strategies for everyday people.

item.title: Understanding Voicebots: A Comprehensive Guide
item.author: Sista AI
item.content:encoded: Voicebots, revolutionizing customer interactions, are virtual assistants powered by AI that understand and respond to user queries in natural language. These digital agents leverage advanced technologies like AI, Speech Recognition, and NLP to engage users effectively.Voicebot Integration and BenefitsIntegrating seamlessly with Customer Care Centers and Call Centers, voicebots automate tasks, enhance operational efficiency, and provide 24/7 support. Their ability to handle multiple inquiries simultaneously improves user experience and saves time for both customers and operators.Voicebot Technology EvolutionEvolved from IBM's Shoebox in 1961 to modern conversational AI assistants like Siri and Google Assistant, voicebots have transcended speech recognition technology. They now offer Voice Activity Detection, ASR, NLU, and TTS features, enabling them to interact naturally and efficiently.Applications Across IndustriesFrom healthcare to banking, voicebots are transforming customer service by providing quicker responses and better support. They cater to a diverse range of industries, offering personalized interactions and streamlined processes.Sista AI's Voice Assistant is at the forefront of AI integration, empowering businesses with voice UI capabilities that increase engagement, accessibility, and efficiency. With features like Context-Aware Agents and Real-Time Data Integration, Sista AI enhances user experience and drives conversions. Experience the future of AI voice assistance with Sista AI's innovative solutions.

item.title: Why Does No One Talk About Gemini?
item.author: Rachit Gupta
item.content:encoded: Everyone’s hyped about GPT, Claude, and DeepSeek, but Gemini hardly gets a mention. I understand it lacks the finesse of the others. But for everyday tasks, strong language skills, and a solid free tier, it’s actually great. Google just isn’t pushing it as hard. Less hype, still useful.Have you tried it? What are your thoughts?

item.title: Crystal prime deluxe 18000
item.author: Android CODE Swag
item.content:encoded: Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000: The Ultimate Disposable Vape Experience The Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 has quickly emerged as one of the most popular disposable vapes in the market, and for good reason. It offers an impressive 18,000 puffs of high-quality vaping pleasure in a sleek, compact design. Whether you are a novice vaper or an experienced enthusiast, this disposable vape provides a smooth, flavorful, and hassle-free experience. In this article, we will dive deep into the features, benefits, and reasons why the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is a must-have for any vaping aficionado.What is the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000? The Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is a disposable vape that offers an extended lifespan of 18,000 puffs, making it one of the longest-lasting disposable vape devices available. Unlike traditional vapes that require refills or charging, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is ready to use straight out of the box. It’s designed for convenience, ease of use, and optimal performance.This disposable vape comes pre-filled with premium e-liquid and features a pre-charged battery, meaning users can enjoy the device right away without any complicated setups. Once the e-liquid runs out or the battery is depleted, simply dispose of the vape and replace it with a new one. It’s a perfect solution for those who want to enjoy the benefits of vaping without the ongoing maintenance or frequent recharges.Key Features of the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000Long-lasting Performance One of the standout features of the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is its incredible puff count. Most disposable vapes typically offer 2000 to 5000 puffs, but the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 lasts up to 18,000 puffs—far more than most other devices on the market. This makes it an ideal choice for long-term users who want to reduce the frequency of purchasing new vapes.This extended puff count also provides a consistent experience throughout its use, ensuring that the flavor and smoothness remain intact. Whether you’re a casual user or someone who vapes frequently, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000’s longevity will meet your needs.Premium E-liquid Flavors Flavor is a critical aspect of the vaping experience, and the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 does not disappoint. This device is filled with high-quality e-liquids available in a variety of flavors to cater to all taste preferences. From fruity blends like watermelon and mango to minty flavors that offer a refreshing hit, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 offers an extensive selection.Some of the popular flavors include:Tropical Mango Cool Mint Watermelon Ice Whether you prefer sweet, fruity flavors or a refreshing menthol, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 has a flavor option that’s sure to satisfy.No Maintenance Required One of the key reasons why people love disposable vapes like the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is the convenience they provide. With traditional vapes, users need to constantly worry about refilling e-liquids, cleaning tanks, and replacing coils. The Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 eliminates all of these issues.The device comes pre-filled with e-liquid and has a pre-charged battery. All you need to do is open the package and start vaping. There’s no need to worry about cleaning or refilling. Once the device runs out of e-liquid or the battery dies, simply dispose of it and grab a new one. This ease of use is one of the reasons disposable vapes like the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 are so popular among both new and experienced vapers.Sleek and Portable Design The Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 features a compact, lightweight design that makes it easy to carry and use on the go. Whether you’re out running errands or relaxing at home, this disposable vape can easily fit into your pocket or bag. Its sleek design doesn’t sacrifice functionality, offering a comfortable grip and ease of use.Vaping on the go has never been easier, and the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 ensures that you can enjoy your favorite vape flavors without the need for bulky devices or complicated setups.Hassle-Free Vaping Experience For those who are new to vaping, or simply don’t want to deal with the complexities of traditional vaping systems, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is a great choice. There are no buttons to press, no settings to adjust, and no coils to replace. Just inhale, and the device will activate automatically. This makes the device incredibly easy to use and perfect for beginners.Additionally, the device’s auto-draw activation ensures that you get a smooth, consistent vaping experience without any interruptions. This is ideal for those who want a stress-free vaping experience without the need for constant maintenance.Benefits of Using the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000Affordability Despite offering an impressive 18,000 puffs, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 remains an affordable option compared to other vaping systems. Since it is a disposable vape, you don’t need to invest in expensive vape mods or e-liquid refills. Once the device is finished, you simply purchase another one, which makes it an economical choice in the long run.Portability and Convenience The compact size of the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 makes it the perfect companion for on-the-go vapers. You can easily slip it into your pocket or bag without it taking up too much space. Whether you're traveling, working, or hanging out with friends, this disposable vape ensures that you can enjoy a satisfying vape session anytime, anywhere.High-quality Construction The Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is built with high-quality materials to ensure both durability and a premium vaping experience. The device features a well-constructed design that not only ensures longevity but also provides a comfortable feel in your hand.The vape is sturdy, reliable, and built to withstand regular use, making it a fantastic option for anyone looking for a disposable vape that offers both performance and durability.Beginners: If you're new to vaping, the simplicity of the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 makes it an ideal entry-level device. There's no need to worry about complex setups or maintenance—just open the device and start vaping. Frequent Vapers: With its extended puff count, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is a great option for those who vape regularly. It offers long-lasting performance, ensuring that you don’t have to constantly buy new disposable vapes. On-the-Go Vapers: If you're always on the move, the compact and portable design of the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 makes it easy to carry with you and enjoy your favorite vape flavors whenever you need a quick break. Conclusion The Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 is a standout disposable vape that combines convenience, performance, and quality. With its impressive puff count, premium e-liquid flavors, and sleek design, it’s a fantastic option for both beginners and experienced vapers. Whether you’re looking for an easy-to-use vape for on-the-go sessions or simply want a high-quality disposable that lasts longer, the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000 has everything you need.Its user-friendly design and long-lasting battery life make it an excellent choice for anyone looking for a no-fuss, hassle-free vaping experience. If you’re interested in trying the Crystal Prime Deluxe 18000, be sure to check out trusted retailers offering this fantastic device and enjoy a premium vaping experience today.

item.title: [AI 동향] 2025-03-07 기술 동향 정리 및 분석
item.author: 정유준
item.content:encoded:
안녕하세요! 오늘의 주요 AI 기술 동향을 정리해서 알려드립니다.
📌 정부의 새로운 디지털 빗자루가 변화에 대한 저항을 청소할 수 있습니까? 작년 9 월, Computer Weekly는 영국 정부에서 가장 선임적이고 영향력있는 디지털 리더 3 명과 함께 새로운 자리에서 미리 도전과 기회에 대해 논의했습니다.원제목: Can the government's new digital broom sweep the civil service clean of its resistance to change?출처: NewsAPI - ComputerWeekly.com
📌 Apple은 M4 Max 및 M3 Ultra Chips 및 Apple Intelligence로 Mac Studio를 새롭게합니다 : 가격, 사양 Apple은 수요일 (3 월 5 일)에 새로운 칩셋 옵션으로 Mac Studio를 새로 고쳤습니다. 소규모 요소 워크 스테이션을 구매할 때 고객은 M4 Max 또는 새로 출시 된 M3 Ultra SOC 중에서 선택할 수 있습니다. 회사는 그것이 Mac 위에 위치한다고 말합니다.원제목: Apple Refreshes Mac Studio With M4 Max and M3 Ultra Chips and Apple Intelligence: Price, Specifications출처: NewsAPI - Gadgets360.com

📌 인도 여행 부문의 성장을 주도하는 새로운 경험 인도 여행자들은 다양한 관광 경험을 탐구하고 있습니다. 그들은 또한 예산 편의를 계속 찾아야하더라도 국제 여행에 더 많은 비용을 기꺼이 지출합니다. -불불 다완원제목: New Experiences Driving Growth in India Travel Sector

📌 패스트 푸드 체인은 조기 실수에도 불구하고 AI 채택을 강화합니다. 패스트 푸드 산업은 McDonald 's, Yum! 브랜드와 Wendy는 운영을 간소화하기 위해 기술 배치를 확대하고 수익성을 향상시킵니다…원제목: Fast Food Chains Step Up AI Adoption Despite Early Missteps
📌 Black Inc는 저자에게 AI 계약에 서명하도록 요청했습니다. 그러나 왜 작가가 AI가 자신의 일을하는 방법을 배우도록 도와야합니까? AI와 저작권 주변의 법률은 여전히 ​​불분명합니다. 이 단계에서는 모든 일이 일어날 수 있습니다.원제목: Black Inc has asked authors to sign AI agreements. But why should writers help AI learn how to do their job?출처: NewsAPI - The Conversation Africa
📌 팀과 함께 Red Hat Summit 2025로 가야하는 5 가지 이유 오늘날 시장에서 곡선보다 앞서있어서 지속적인 학습, 지속적인 협업 및 (운이 좋으면) 혁신이 필요합니다. Red Hat Summit은 Red Hat 및 Open Source의 모든 프리미어 기술 컨퍼런스입니다. 그러나 그것은 단순한 회의 그 이상입니다. 답장…원제목: Top 5 reasons to go with your team to Red Hat Summit 2025
📌 Red Hat은 Axiom Space와 팀을 이루어 시작하여 우주 회사의 데이터 센터 Unit-1을 궤도에서 최적화합니다. 세계 최고의 오픈 소스 솔루션 및 공리 공간 공급 업체 인 Red Hat, Inc.는 주요 공간 인프라 제공 업체 인 AXDCU-1 (AxDCU-1)에서 공동 작업을 수행 할 예정이며, 2025 년 봄에 국제 우주 STA까지 출시 될 예정입니다.원제목: Red Hat Teams Up with Axiom Space to Launch, Optimize the Space Company’s Data Center Unit-1 On Orbit유타 테크 대학교 (Utah Tech University)의 과학, 공학 및 기술 대학 (College of Science, Engineering & Technology)은 인공 지능 및 머신 러닝에서 임기 트랙 조교수를 찾고 있습니다. 포지션은 2025 년 1 월 1 일 또는 7 월 1 일에 시작됩니다.원제목: Assistant Professor in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning출처: NewsAPI - Nlppeople.com이상으로 오늘의 AI 기술 동향이었습니다. 더 자세한 내용은 원문 링크를 참고해 주세요.해당 포스트는 자동으로 생성되었으며, 기계 번역이 포함되어 있을 수 있습니다.

item.title: How to Run Tests in Visual Studio Code: A Complete Guide
item.author: keploy
item.content:encoded:
Did you know that you can run tests directly within ? Thanks to its built-in support for multiple testing frameworks, testing becomes faster and more efficient. You can debug tests, analyze results, and ensure your code’s reliability-all within the IDE.Testing is crucial in software development to validate code performance, functionality, and stability. Whether you're performing unit tests, integration tests, or end-to-end tests, VS Code provides powerful extensions and tools to streamline the process.In this guide, we’ll walk you through setting up, configuring, writing, and running tests in VS Code.Before starting, ensure you have:: Prepare some code and corresponding test files.Testing Framework Installed: Install a framework relevant to your language:Steps to Run Tests in VS CodeStep 1: Set Up the Testing EnvironmentInstall Testing Dependencies* Run the relevant installation command in your terminal: ```sh npm install --save-dev jest # For JavaScript pip install pytest # For Python mvn test # For Java with Maven ``` * Create a folder called `tests` (or similar) in your project’s root directory.
* Follow naming conventions (e.g., `test_example.py` for Python, `math.test.js` for JavaScript).
* ![](https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1741257341084/d7f076db-ec86-4bc0-a4ce-172462f27d4b.png) Step 2: Configure VS Code for Testing (Optional)* Configure VS Code to recognize your testing framework.
* Open `settings.json` (press `Ctrl + ,` or `Cmd + ,` on Mac) and add: ```json { "python.testing.pytestEnabled": true, "python.testing.unittestEnabled": false, "python.testing.pytestArgs": ["tests"] } ``` Enable Testing Extensions* Install and activate the relevant testing extension:
* **Python Testing**: Install the **Python extension**.
* **JavaScript Testing**: Install the **Jest extension**. Step 3: Write and Run Tests ```js test('adds 1 + 2 to equal 3', () => { expect(1 + 2).toBe(3); }); ``` ```python def test_addition(): assert 1 + 2 == 3 ``` * [**Java (JUnit)**](https://keploy.io/blog/community/how-to-use-junit-on-vs-code-a-comprehensive-guide) ```java import static org.junit.Assert.assertEquals; import org.junit.Test; public class MathTest { @Test public void testAddition() { assertEquals(3, 1 + 2); } } ``` * Open the test file in VS Code.
* **Use the Testing Panel**:
* Click the **Testing Icon** in the Activity Bar.
* Click **Run All Tests** or click the **play icon** next to a specific test.
* **Run from Terminal (Optional)**: ```sh npm test # Jest pytest # Python mvn test # JUnit (Maven) ``` * Click to the left of a line number in your test file to set a **breakpoint**. * Right-click the test and select **Debug Test**.
* Use the **Debug Panel** to step through the code, inspect variables, and evaluate expressions
![](https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1741257369405/189d768b-7555-469f-a792-5671252c9839.png) How Keploy Helps in Creating Unit Test Cases Easily from VS Code?, an AI-powered testing tool, simplifies the process of writing and maintaining in VS Code. By analyzing your source code, Keploy automatically generates test cases, reducing manual effort and improving test coverage.Here’s how Keploy enhances the testing experience:Automated Test Case Generation* Keploy reads your source code and **auto-generates unit test cases** based on function behaviors.
* It captures API interactions and creates structured test cases for easier debugging. Seamless Integration with VS Code* Install the **Keploy extension** in VS Code for an effortless setup.
* Supports multiple languages, including **Java, Python, and JavaScript**. Run & Debug Tests with One Command* Keploy provides a **single command** to run and validate generated test cases.
* Debugging is simplified with structured test logs and failure analysis. Enhances Code Quality & Coverage* Ensures **100% test coverage** by generating test cases even for untested code paths.
* Reduces human effort, making test creation quick and error-free. Running tests in is a simple yet powerful way to ensure code reliability and maintainability. With the right setup, you can speed up debugging, improve productivity, and maintain high-quality code.Start integrating with your preferred testing framework today and experience seamless testing workflows!
1. Can I use multiple test frameworks in a single project? Yes, VS Code supports multiple testing frameworks. Configure them in accordingly.
2. Are extensions required to run tests in VS Code? No, but extensions enhance the experience by providing features like test discovery, visualization, and debugging.
3. Can I run tests on a remote server using VS Code? Yes! Use the extension pack to run tests on remote servers or containers.

item.title: Implement a Natural Language System Configuration Manager with Spring AI
item.author: 沧海月明Z有泪
item.content:encoded:
System configuration management is typically handled through configuration files, environment variables, or admin interfaces. But what if we could change system settings simply by chatting with our application? In this article, I'll show you how to build a chatbot that can understand and modify system configurations using natural language, powered by Spring AI.
The Power of Natural Language Configuration Traditional configuration management requires users to:Know exact parameter names and valid valuesNavigate through configuration files or interfacesUnderstand technical syntax and formattingBy using natural language processing, we can make this process more intuitive. Users can simply say things like "increase the connection timeout to 30 seconds" or "enable debug logging for the authentication module."Spring AI supports tool functions that allow the AI model to take specific actions. We'll define functions for reading and updating configurations:
Integrating Tools into Chatbot Service The chatbot service will handle the natural language processing:I created an interface to unify all the tool functions.Attention: The chatbot has two functions: first, it serves as a Q&A chatbot; second, it acts as a configuration management chatbot. Therefore, there is a judgment to determine whether the question is a Q&A query or a configuration management query before calling the LLMHere are some example interactions with the chatbot:First, I input "Query System Configurations" then the chatbot will return the current system configuration settings.I input 'Get value of Auto Release Delay Time,' and the chatbot returns the current value. Then, I input 'Set value to 10 min' to update it. The chatbot confirms the change by returning the new value.When implementing this type of system, consider these security aspects:Authentication and AuthorizationEnsure only authorized users can access the configuration chatbotImplement role-based access control for different configuration categoriesValidation and ConstraintsAdd validation rules for configuration valuesImplement constraints to prevent critical system settings from being modifiedLog all configuration changesRecord who made the change and whenThis approach to configuration management offers several advantages:Natural language interaction reduces the learning curveUsers don't need to remember exact configuration keysFaster configuration changes without navigating complex interfacesThe AI can validate and sanitize inputsImmediate feedback on invalid configurationsGuided experience for complex settingsPerfect for DevOps and System AdministrationQuick configuration changes during deploymentsEasier troubleshooting and system maintenanceReduced documentation needs
Other Use Cases with function call Customer Support: Automatically create support tickets, fetch order details, or provide FAQs.E-commerce: Recommend products, process payments, or track shipments.Healthcare: Schedule appointments, retrieve patient records, or send medication reminders.Finance: Fetch account balances, perform transactions, or provide investment insights.By combining Spring AI with system configuration management, we've created a more intuitive and user-friendly way to manage application settings. This approach shows how AI can simplify traditional technical tasks and make them accessible to a broader audience.The complete source code for this project is available on GitHub OpenWES. Feel free to try it out and adapt it to your needs!Remember to handle edge cases, add proper error handling, and implement security measures before using this in a production environment.

item.title: The Role of AI and Data Science in FinTech
item.author: Suresh Ommi
item.content:encoded: The Role of AI and Data Science in FinTechThe FinTech industry is evolving rapidly with AI and Data Science, transforming fraud detection, banking, credit scoring, and trading. These technologies are enabling faster, smarter, and more secure financial solutions for banks, investment firms, and digital payment platforms.1. AI in Fraud Detection & Risk ManagementAI enhances fraud prevention by analyzing transaction patterns and detecting anomalies in real-time, reducing false positives compared to rule-based systems.: Platforms like Feedzai and Darktrace flag fraudulent activities before they cause damage.: ✔ Instantly detects suspicious transactions. ✔ Reduces manual fraud investigations. ✔ Strengthens financial security.: AI-driven fraud detection improves risk management and protects financial institutions.2. AI Chatbots & Personalized BankingAI-powered virtual assistants provide 24/7 customer support and offer automated financial insights.: Erica (Bank of America) and Cleo analyze spending patterns and automate savings.: ✔ Enhances customer experience. ✔ Automates banking queries. ✔ Reduces operational costs.: AI-driven banking delivers personalized, efficient, and seamless customer experiences.3. AI in Credit Scoring & Loan ApprovalsAI improves credit assessments by analyzing alternative data sources, making loans accessible to underbanked individuals.: Upstart and Zest AI assess eligibility beyond traditional credit scores.: ✔ Expands financial inclusion. ✔ Speeds up loan approvals. ✔ Reduces bias in lending decisions.: AI-powered credit scoring enhances fairness and accessibility in lending.4. AI in Algorithmic Trading & InvestmentsAI-powered trading algorithms analyze financial data, predict market trends, and execute trades automatically.: Kavout and Alpaca help hedge funds optimize trading strategies.: ✔ Improves market predictions. ✔ Enhances trading efficiency. ✔ Adapts to real-time fluctuations.: AI is revolutionizing investment decisions with automated, data-driven strategies.5. The Future of AI in FinTech AI will continue shaping financial services with:AI-powered investment advisors.AI + Blockchain for fraud-proof transactions.Biometric banking for ultra-secure authentication.: AI is not replacing financial professionals, it’s empowering them with smarter tools and insights. The future of FinTech belongs to those who embrace AI innovation.

item.title: 1minDocker #14 - Deploy an AI app with Docker on cloud
item.author: Clelia (Astra) Bertelli
item.content:encoded:
In the last article we dove into the world of continuous integration with GitHub Actions. Now it's time to take a step forward and to talk about deploying a Docker application and make it available to everyone. To do this, we could exploit a local server, but local servers are usually costly to set up, initialize and maintain (on the long run): cloud solutions are, on the other hand, simpler and faster to boot and set up, especially the one we are going to use for this tutorial,
Step 1: your Linode instance Setting up a Linode instance couldn't be easier: you just need to sign up or log in to Linode.Once you land into your dashboard, you just need to click on (green button on the top left corner) -> . Then you will be prompted to select the settings of your instance (operating system, region, name, root password and, eventually, an SSH key). The set up is extremely intuitive and, for our application, I'd suggest:Choose Ubuntu 22.04 as OSChoose a 2GB RAM - 1 vCPU hardwareChoose the region that is closer to youChoose a strong password for your root userOnce you are set up and your instance is booted and running, you can connect to it from your terminal. Regardless that you are on Windows, macOS or Linux (although I prefer the last one), you can simply use the SSH protocol and authenticate with the root password. To do so, you need to get the public IP address of your Linode (which will be useful also later) - you can comfortably find it in you dashboard.ssh root@<PUBLIC-IP-ADDRESS> You'll be prompted to input the password and, after that, you'll be finally inside your Linode's terminal!
Step 2: preparing your Linode for the application Since we want to deploy our application with Docker, we need to install it within our Linode virtual machine.If you followed my advice and you created an Ubuntu 22.04 machine, you can simply try these commands, that you can also find on the official Docker installation page:apt-get update apt-get ca-certificates curl 0755 /etc/apt/keyrings curl https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
dpkg /etc/os-release | /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list /dev/null apt-get update apt-get docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin Test the successful installation with:docker run hello-world And BAM! You installed Docker🐋
Step 3: Get the application For this tutorial, I already prepared an application for you: it's called and it's a BlueSky bot which publishes daily science news from trusted publishers. SciNewsBot exploits Mistral AI to summarizes into an effective and catchy headlines the titles and content of news from Google News publishers that are labelled as trustworthy by Media Bias/Fact Check. These news spans four domains (Science, Environment, Energy and Technology), and are scraped and published 4 times a day, with a pause of 3 hours in between and with a pause of 12 hours from the last news report of one day to the first news report of the following day. You can see the bot working in this pageSo, from within your Linode instance (which you connected to via SSH in previous steps) clone the application from GitHub:git clone https://github.com/AstraBert/SciNewsBot.git SciNewsBot/ Now the only things you need to do are:Create a BlueSky user for your bot, and you can do it hereModify your file with reporting the Mistral API key, the BlueSky username and password Rename the file to with the following command: Now we're just one step away from deployment, and that step is launching our application through Docker. Let's take a look to the file that we have in the SciNewsBot folderThis file creates a container from the subfolder we have, mounting within it three environment-derived secrets, i.e the Mistral AI API key, the BlueSky username and the password. It then attaches the container to a network named .Each of this secrets is accessible through the path /run/secrets/<secret_name>, and that's how we do that in our python scripts (we read these files).Now, to deploy we just need to run:Don't forget to put the option, otherwise you will kill the container execution one you exit from the Linode terminal: the option detaches the container execution from the main terminal, allowing you to close it without stopping the container.Congrats! You just deployed your first Docker application on cloud!🎉We will stop here for this article, but in the next (and last article) we will see more complex deployment use cases and will wrap up the 1minDocker journey: stay tuned and have fun!🥰

item.title: Overview: "InfiniRetri: Enhancing LLMs for Infinite-Length Context via Attention-Based Retrieval"
item.author: foxgem
item.content:encoded:
This paper introduces InfiniRetri, a novel and training-free method that leverages the inherent attention mechanisms of Large Language Models (LLMs) to achieve accurate retrieval across inputs of theoretically infinite length. By observing the correlation between attention distribution and generated answers, InfiniRetri repurposes the LLM's attention to act as a retrieval mechanism, significantly improving performance on long-context tasks, particularly in question answering. The method demonstrates state-of-the-art results on the Needle-In-a-Haystack (NIH) test, achieving 100% accuracy over 1M tokens with a small 0.5B parameter model, and shows substantial improvements on real-world benchmarks like LongBench.LLM (Large Language Model): A deep learning model trained on a massive dataset to understand and generate human-like text. The maximum length of input text that an LLM can process at once.RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation): A framework that combines a retrieval module (to fetch relevant documents) with a generation module (LLM) to improve response quality.KV Cache (Key-Value Cache): A memory store used in transformer models to store key and value vectors from previous layers, allowing for faster processing of long sequences.NIH (Needle-In-a-Haystack): A task where a specific piece of information ("needle") must be retrieved from a large document ("haystack"). A neural network architecture that relies on self-attention mechanisms to process sequential data. A phenomenon where the initial tokens in a sequence receive disproportionately high attention scores, hindering the model's ability to focus on relevant information later in the sequence.
Point 1: The Problem of Limited Context in LLMs LLMs have limitations in handling long input contexts due to their limited context window size. Scaling up the context window is computationally expensive and yields diminishing returns due to the long-tail distribution of document lengths. Existing approaches, such as positional embedding adjustments and sliding window techniques, have limitations in effectively processing and aggregating information across multiple context windows.The authors highlight that simply increasing the context window size of LLMs is not a sustainable solution due to computational costs and the infrequency of very long documents.They also point out the shortcomings of methods like positional extrapolation and sliding windows, which either require training or fail to capture global information across the entire long context.
Point 2: InfiniRetri's Attention-Based Retrieval Mechanism InfiniRetri addresses the long-context problem by leveraging the LLM's own attention mechanism as a retrieval tool. The method observes that attention allocation patterns in LLMs align with retrieval-augmented capabilities. It uses a sliding window approach, iteratively processing segments of the long context and employing a novel token retrieval strategy based on the distribution of attention scores to determine which information to retain in a cache. The long input text is divided into smaller, manageable chunks based on sentence boundaries. Each chunk is processed sequentially, combined with cached information from previous steps. The attention scores from the last layer of the LLM are analyzed to determine the importance of each token in the context. A 1D convolution operation is applied to the attention scores to identify phrases of important tokens. The top-K most important tokens are selected. Sentences containing these top-K tokens are cached for use in subsequent iterations.
Key Implementation Detail: InfiniRetri caches token IDs of relevant sentences rather than key-value states, which sets it apart from KV cache compression methods.
Point 3: InfiniRetri's Superior Performance and Efficiency InfiniRetri achieves state-of-the-art results on the NIH task, surpassing other methods and larger models by achieving 100% accuracy over 1M tokens with a 0.5B parameter model. It also demonstrates significant performance improvements on real-world benchmarks like LongBench, with a maximum 288% improvement in multi-document QA tasks. Furthermore, InfiniRetri reduces inference latency and computational overhead by processing only a small fraction of the original long context.The paper highlights the practical benefits of InfiniRetri, including its ability to handle extremely long contexts, improve accuracy on retrieval-based tasks, and reduce computational costs.It contrasts InfiniRetri with traditional RAG approaches, which rely on external embedding models.
Improvements And Creativity The paper introduces a novel perspective on leveraging the inherent capabilities of LLMs for long-context processing.The concept of "attention allocation alignment with retrieval-augmented" is a key innovation that guides the design of InfiniRetri.The method is training-free and can be applied to any Transformer-based LLM, making it highly accessible and practical.The approach of caching sentence-level tokens instead of individual tokens or key-value states is a significant departure from existing KV cache compression methods.InfiniRetri demonstrates that enhancing the long-text capabilities of LLMs can be achieved through multiple approaches, not just by scaling up the context window.Strengthening the model's internal capabilities within a smaller context window, combined with the InfiniRetri mechanism, can lead to better long-context performance.The paper suggests that further research should focus on optimizing InfiniRetri for summarization tasks, which require a more comprehensive understanding of the entire context.The method could offer new possibilities for the development of RAG and related techniques by incorporating the "retrieval in attention" concept.Source 1 - arXiv preprint arXiv:2303.08774Source 2 - arXiv preprint arXiv:2308.14508Source 3 - arXiv preprint arXiv:2502.12962v1Report generated by TSW-X Advanced Research Systems Division Date: 2025-03-07 09:10:11.649964
